title: Antonio Rattín, Whose World Cup Expulsion Led to Penalty-Card System, Dies at 89
summary_full: The ejection of the Argentine soccer star during a 1966 match against England led to the introduction of yellow and red cards.
summary_public: The ejection of the Argentine soccer star during a 1966 match against England led to the introduction of yellow and red cards.
